query: SELECT item_id, name, category, rarity, stackable FROM game_item_catalog WHERE item_id IN ('I_M001', 'iron_sword', 'E_M001') OR name LIKE '%武器強化卷軸%' OR name LIKE '%戰士之證%' LIMIT 20;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user PS8xt1zjvuRpYHF.3bd331015af6 --database MLF7bLVZzzxdGTPVXTct3c --execute SELECT item_id, name, category, rarity, stackable FROM game_item_catalog WHERE item_id IN ('I_M001', 'iron_sword', 'E_M001') OR name LIKE '%武器強化卷軸%' OR name LIKE '%戰士之證%' LIMIT 20;
